indications.text:
YORVIPATH is indicated for the treatment of hypoparathyroidism in adults.
Limitations of Use
• YORVIPATH was not studied for acute post-surgical hypoparathyroidism.
• YORVIPATH’s titration scheme was only evaluated in adults who first achieved an
albumin-corrected serum calcium of at least 7.8 mg/dL...
